Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext

Class PlainTextSerializer

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.Context
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContextable
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingTraverseContext
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.Serializer
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.WriterSerializer
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext.PlainTextSerializer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Function<Object,String>, ThrowingFunction<Object,String>, PlainTextMetaProvider, RecordWritable
public class PlainTextSerializer extends WriterSerializer implements PlainTextMetaProvider, RecordWritable
Serializes POJOs to plain text using just the toString() method on the serialized object.
Media types
Handles Accept types: text/plain

Produces Content-Type types: text/plain

Description
Essentially converts POJOs to plain text using the toString() method.

Also serializes objects using a transform if the object class has an ObjectSwap<?,String> transform defined on it.

Notes:
  • This class is thread safe and reusable.

      public PlainTextSerializer.Builder copy()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Creates a builder from this context object.

      Builders are used to define new contexts (e.g. serializers, parsers) based on existing configurations.

      A new Builder object.

    • createSession

      public PlainTextSerializerSession.Builder createSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Create a session builder based on the properties defined on this context.

      Use this method for creating sessions where you want to override basic settings. Otherwise, use Context.getSession() directly.

      Overrides:
      createSession in class WriterSerializer
      Returns:
      A new session builder.

    • getSession

      public PlainTextSerializerSession getSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Returns a session to use for this context.

      Note that subclasses may opt to return a reusable non-modifiable session.

      Overrides:
      getSession in class WriterSerializer
      Returns:
      A new session object.

    • serializeRecords

      public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException
      Convenience delegator that opens a RecordWriter over the output using default session arguments (mirrors WriterSerializer.serialize(Object)).

      The real implementation lives on PlainTextSerializerSession.serializeRecords(Object). Callers that need request-derived configuration should call createSession() and invoke PlainTextSerializerSession.serializeRecords(Object) on the built session instead.

      Specified by:
      serializeRecords in interface RecordWritable
      Parameters:
      output - The output.
      Returns:
      A new RecordWriter.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.

    • isRecordStreaming

      public boolean isRecordStreaming()
      Description copied from interface: RecordWritable
      Streaming-quality signal queryable before opening a cursor.
      Specified by:
      isRecordStreaming in interface RecordWritable
      Returns:
      true if RecordWritable.serializeRecords(Object) returns an O(1)-memory streaming cursor; false for buffered (whole-value) formats backed by RecordAdapter.
